RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - UNABLE TO FORWARD

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTONIO, MARGUARDT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-18-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--- LAI WAH CHAN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY--CITY ATTORNEY OFFICE. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BENJAMIN GIANG. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, MEI RAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANTONIO, MARGUARDT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
